content.en:
Rumble!!!

One of the soul hands of the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape reached over, turned into a shocking giant hand, and slapped towards Ye Tian at once.

The terrifying soul coercion permeated all around, even making the void here tremble.

"It's amazing!"

Ye Tian commented.

But he didn't panic at all, in terms of soul talent, he was not weaker than this Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape at all, and even stronger.

Moreover, he also has the power of the Chaos Avenue and other talents, even if it is difficult for other talents to exert their power, they can still increase some of their strength.

Therefore, he was not afraid of this Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape.

"Soul Warframe Talent, Open!"

"Soul Defense Talent, Open!"

"Soul Spear Talent, Open!"

Ye Tian opened a door soul talent and responded to this Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape with the strongest attitude.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian collided with the soul hand of the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape with a spear.

At the same time, Ye Tian also cast the Purple Pupil Soul Eye, trying to restrain the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape, and using the power of time and space to influence the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape.

Under the multiple means, Ye Tian's soul spear was not broken, but the soul hand of the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape was cracked.

In this fight, Ye Tian had the upper hand.

After all, Ye Tian possessed the power of the Chaos Dao, plus his soul talent was also very powerful, and with other means, he naturally surpassed the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape.

Ye Tian and the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape continued to fight, although they suppressed the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape, but the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape's soul defense talent reached the arcane level, and the soul strength was also very high.

Therefore, Ye Tian only slightly injured the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape, and it was impossible to quickly resolve the battle.

Time passed little by little, Ye Tian went all out, and in a blink of an eye, half a day passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's immortal soul power was seriously consumed, but the Tianbao Soul Ape was also very seriously consumed, and the Tianbao Soul Ape was not lightly injured.

The wound of the soul is not an ordinary injury, and it is very difficult to recover, if you cultivate quietly and take some medicine that helps to restore the soul, it will indeed recover quickly.

But in battle, it is difficult to recover your soul quickly.

Therefore, the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape was destined to be difficult to recover from his injuries during the battle.

After another while, under Ye Tian's full strength and a soul spear, the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape finally dissipated.

So far, Ye Tian has passed the third round of assessment.

"The third round of assessment was successful, and the fourth round of assessment is about to begin!"

The voice of the machine spirit came.

Ye Tian thought that the fourth round of assessment was still a battle, but he thought wrongly.

......

"This is ......"

Ye Tian looked around and found himself in a secret room.

In the chamber, there is only a hanging picture, or a special pattern condensed by countless rays of light.

Other than that, there is nothing else!

At this time, the machine spirit took the initiative to appear and stood in front of Ye Tian.

"You're good enough to make it past the third round. In the history of the ghost clan, only one person has passed the third round, and he has passed the assessment by cheating by special means. But he didn't make it through the fourth round, and hopefully you'll pass the fourth round. Because of the core inheritance of the Hades civilization, the lowest level needs to pass the fourth round of assessment, otherwise they are not eligible to obtain. "

Instrument Spirit Dao.

"I'll do my best!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Let me tell you about the fourth round of assessment first. This is a secret map of the soul, a mysterious pattern completely condensed by the law of the soul. It can be said that this pattern is also a kind of inheritance, a relatively low-level inheritance. Although you have now comprehended the mystery of the soul, the mystery is only the external manifestation of the law, so for you, the soul law on this pattern is relatively profound. However, there is still hope that you will pass the fourth round of assessments. The fourth round of assessment only requires one point, and then this soul law pattern is engraved. As long as you engrave 30%, you will be considered to have passed the assessment, and if you engrave all of them, you can get additional rewards. I don't think you can engrave them all, try to engrave them all!"

With that, the machine spirit vanished.

"Engrave the law pattern!"

Ye Tian stared at this pattern and muttered.

"Remember, you have a limited amount of time, only half a year. It is forbidden to use the law of time here, and forcibly using it will have no effect, but it will affect your own enlightenment!"

The voice of the machine spirit was heard again.

Half a year is not a long time, and for Ye Tian, although there is no need to fight in the fourth round of assessment, it is still very difficult.

"First copy all the soul talents copied from the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape, and have more mystery-level soul talents, which will make my soul mystical attainments stronger, and my understanding of the soul law will be easier!"

As a result, Ye Tian began to fuse the soul talent copied from the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape.

A few hours later, Ye Tian copied all the soul talents on the Heavenly Treasure Soul Ape.

At this time, Ye Tian already possessed a number of mystery-level soul talents.

For example, the soul defense talent, the soul armor talent, the soul hand talent, and several other soul talents are also close to the arcane level.

"Let's start to comprehend this soul law map, otherwise you won't understand it at all, and you won't be able to engrave this soul law map at all!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the past, he had almost never heard of the soul law, and in the universe, the top soul talent was even the limit, and it was difficult to even comprehend the soul mysteries, let alone comprehend the soul law.

Therefore, even those supreme beings have not studied the soul law.

This is a completely new path, even if a supreme-level powerhouse comes here, it may not be better than Ye Tian, and it will even be more difficult to assess because of the high realm.

Soon, Ye Tian was immersed in the subtlety of the Soul Law, and his entire soul seemed to have been sublimated.

It was at this moment that he realized the mystery of the soul, the complexity and importance of the soul.

In today's universe, people almost all take the physical body and energy as the direction of cultivation, but very few involve the soul, and there is basically no soul as the mainstream practice.

"It's amazing! I really want to see how long it has been!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But now there is not much time given to him, he must take advantage of half a year to understand this soul law diagram thoroughly, and then engrave it.

In order to speed up his comprehension, Ye Tian even opened up his comprehension talent.

Time passed little by little, Ye Tian didn't waste a little time at all, and tried his best to comprehend the soul law pattern.

Finally, half a year has passed.

"Assessor, engrave the law pattern!"

The voice of the machine spirit came.

"Good!"

Ye Tian used his hand as a pen and manipulated a trace of soul law to begin to engrave in the void.

Whoa!!

A trace of the soul law began to converge, slowly forming a pattern.

Ye Tian's inscription was very slow, and it took a full three hours for him to finish the inscription.

"Start testing!"

The voice of the machine spirit rang out.

About a minute or so passed, and the machine spirit said: "The completion of the inscription is seventy percent, and it is overdone!"

"Seventy percent, almost!"

Ye Tian nodded secretly.

This was similar to what he had estimated, and he also wanted to fully engrave the entire Soul Law Diagram, but the time he had been in contact with the Soul Law was too short, and even if his talent was against the sky, it would be difficult to be 100% inscribed.

To be able to complete seventy percent, he feels very satisfied.
